name: Caramel Apple Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F (200°C).
2. Cream together butter, shortening, and brown sugar until fluffy.
3. Add flour, oatmeal, salt, and baking soda to the mixture; mix well.
4. Set aside 2 cups of the mixture.
5. Press the remaining mixture into a 9 x 13 inch pan.
6. Toss apples with flour.
7. Spoon apples over the crust.
8. Melt butter and caramel in a saucepan over low heat.
9. Drizzle melted caramel over apples.
10. Top with reserved oatmeal mixture.
11. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until lightly browned.
12. Allow to cool before cutting.
